meta.name: Customer Win-Loss Analyzer
meta.description: Process win/loss notes from sales calls and CRM to identify patterns, objections, and competitive advantages. Produce monthly win-loss intelligence.

parameters.content:
## 36 — Customer Win-Loss Analyzer

**Required:**
- WINLOSS_SHEET_ID: columns date, outcome (win|loss|no-decision), competitor, mrr, segment, notes, primary_reason
- OpenAI API, SMTP Email, NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Schedule:** 1st of month at 11:00
**Status:** Beta.

values.content: Analyze win-loss sales data and extract competitive intelligence. Return JSON only.

parameters.subject: 🏆 Win-Loss Analysis {{ $json.period }}: {{ $json.win_rate }}% win rate | ${{ $json.total_won_mrr }} won / ${{ $json.total_lost_mrr }} lost
